programme.desc: Nelscott Reef lies just off the coast of Oregon and is home to a cold, savage wave that only appears 1-2 times per year, but when the conditions are right this awe inspiring wave can reach heights of up to 50-feet. The Nelscott Reef Tow-In Surf Championships involve the world’s best big-wave tow-in surfers including World Champion Garrett MacNamara and XXL champion Brad Gerlach who, along with 20 other world-class surfers, attempt to tame this monster of the sea.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep113: Lions of the Deep
programme.desc: In the past 50 years, sea lion populations have declined more than 80% along the North Pacific coast. Scientists at the University of British Columbia, and the Vancouver Aquarium, are working together to help save North America’s iconic and largest pinniped - the stellar sea lion.

programme.title: Real Man TV
programme.desc: Ziplining in Colorado’s Gorges, free falls and donuts. The Real Man show is back in full swing in Colorado. Kyle is joined by special guests and American Patriots as he explores what thrills and adventures this amazing country has to offer. And he’s just getting started.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Kayleb Wagner, Florida’s all-time record-breaking running back from a football recruitment powerhouse state. On September 17, 2021, Kayleb shattered the state rushing record previously held by Derrick Henry—Alabama alum, now a Tennessee Titan and one of the NFL’s most dominant running backs. As a new superstar flooded with media attention, Kayleb was poised for scholarship offers, including one from Army that was later withdrawn. The reason? Despite his athletic and academic excellence, Kayleb has one arm. Join Country Ball to hear Kayleb’s journey through his own words and those of his inspiring mom, Sam, exploring where he’s been, what he’s doing now, and where he’s headed.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: Laura’s search for farm heroes leads her to White Cloud, Kansas to meet with Ray Archuleta who is inspiring an entire generation of agricultural trailblazers. In order to prove how vital soil health is to farming, Ray and Laura get their hands dirty in the fields to collect samples. With three samples in tow, its back to the lab they go to try out Ray’s rain simulator. How will the farm samples stack up? Let’s find out.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: With the mission complete, the contestants think the season is winding down—but HQ has other plans. Their once-fabricated cover story becomes reality, pulling them into a pulse-pounding new challenge designed to test strength, coordination, and mastery of weaponry. This hybrid competition pushes every skill to the limit, weeding out all but the most well-rounded tactical athletes. Along the way, the legendary Don Mann shares his own backstory, giving rare insight into the life and mindset of the man behind the mission. When the dust settles, only one competitor will rise above the rest—earning the title of the season’s most complete warrior.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The competition reaches its ultimate test as the Face-Off enters Phase Two. Contestants are pushed to their breaking points with a brutal mix of tactical and physical challenges—running and gunning through the forest, navigating five tactical evolutions, and grinding through five grueling physical trials, capped by a punishing two-mile run over unforgiving terrain. Along the way, Don reveals the origins of his legendary SEAL Adventure Challenge, the inspiration behind this ultimate proving ground. When one contestant’s body shuts down in shock, the resilience of the warrior mindset is put on full display in a dramatic fight to recover and press on. In this season finale, only the strongest will endure, but every competitor leaves forged by fire.

programme.title: S1E1 NHL After Dark
programme.desc: In this episode, NHL and GoPro team up to show the game from the perspective of some of hockey’s greatest players. On NHL After Dark, Detroit Red Wings forward Tomáš Tatar puts his street hockey skills to the test with challenging stickhandling drills. Pittsburgh Penguins center Evgeni Malkin, three-time Stanley Cup champion and 2012 Hart Memorial Trophy winner, showcases his smooth hands and technical mastery as he takes on drills that look simple but are far from easy. Chicago Blackhawks defender Duncan Keith elevates target practice to an art form while outmaneuvering his opponents with precision and speed.

programme.title: S1E2 NHL After Dark
programme.desc: In this episode, NHL and GoPro join forces to capture the game through the eyes of hockey’s best players. Vancouver Canucks duo Daniel and Henrik Sedin showcase their legendary on-ice chemistry through a series of unconventional drills. Philadelphia Flyers center Claude Giroux returns for his second episode, using lightning-fast hands and impressive physicality to outmaneuver his opponents. Colorado Avalanche forward Gabriel Landeskog powers through defenders and scores hard-hitting goals that put our cameras to the ultimate test. New Jersey Devils goalie Cory Schneider takes on unique drills that double the challenge and push his skills to the limit.

programme.title: S1E1 Draft Story
programme.desc: In Part 1, we uncover the story of Tyvis Powell and the people who shaped him into the man and football player he is today. His road to the NFL was anything but easy, and it nearly never happened without the guidance of his mentor, Sean Williams. A Draft Story is a GoPro Original Production that follows Ohio State safety Tyvis Powell as he makes the leap to professional football. Though he was not invited to Chicago for the 2016 NFL Draft, his journey is unforgettable. Witness the tension, hope, and emotion as Tyvis waits for the call that will change his life and etch the Powell name into NFL history. This is his Draft Story.

programme.title: Law of the Lash

programme.title: Judge Roy Bean — Season 1, Episode 29: “Bad Medicine
programme.desc: Judge Roy Bean dispenses his unique brand of frontier justice when a suspicious illness spreads through the town, raising fears of foul play. As tensions rise and accusations mount, Bean must uncover the truth behind the so-called “bad medicine” while keeping order in his rough-and-tumble courtroom.

programme.title: 3 Bullets for Ringo
programme.desc: Ringo Carson has a tough life. First, he has a falling out with his best friend, Frank Sanders, after saving Jane, the girl he loves, from Mexican kidnappers in order to extort a ransom from her gunrunner father

programme.title: Buckskin Frontier
programme.desc: A railroad man and the owner of a freight line battle for control of a crucial mountain pass.

programme.title: Dead Aim
programme.desc: A traveling gravedigger during an (unspecified) war adopts a orphan he finds alone in the desert. After the war with the orphan grown and business slow, the orphan begins to generate business himself by shooting people.

programme.title: Blue Steel
programme.desc: U.S. marshal John Carruthers observes a robbery and Sheriff Jake thinks he may be the culprit. Meanwhile the town's leading citizen is planning to rob everybody blind.

programme.title: Four of the Apocalypse 1975
programme.desc: In Four of the Apocalypse, director Lucio Fulci delivers a gritty and haunting Spaghetti Western. After a crooked sheriff banishes four misfits—a gambler, a prostitute, a drunk, and a simple-minded man—they journey across a lawless frontier searching for survival and redemption. But their path collides with a sadistic bandit, plunging them into violence, cruelty, and despair. Blending raw brutality with moments of tenderness, this bleak tale explores the struggle for humanity in a world gone savage.
